reason_for_decision: The article passes because it draws a clear boundary between physical sensing and emission sensing, then turns that distinction into useful deployment guidance.
strengths: The article explains what radar and RF actually measure instead of comparing them through vague feature lists.
It handles the role of Remote ID and cooperative versus non-cooperative traffic in a practical way.
The selection sequence near the end gives readers a usable decision framework rather than a generic winner-loser verdict.
summary_assessment: This article is strong enough to pass under the strict rubric. It is technically coherent, useful for system selection, and keeps the layered-system conclusion grounded in real sensing differences.
